case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ROBYN BRANNON et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-19-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROBYN BRANON'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Continued To Jan-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robyn Brannon is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The Court sets a settled protective date of 1-17-2012, per request of plaintiff's counsel. The 1-9-2012 trial date is continued to 1-17-2012.
